evals.prompt: Please analyze this Diagnostics-Report.html from a customer. It is a newer report with script#diagnostics-report-data, several sessions, and a few error events in the newest session. Tell me what likely happened and what I should inspect next.
evals.expected_output: Uses embedded JSON as source of truth, focuses on newest session and errors, and returns a concise evidence-backed troubleshooting summary.

evals.prompt: I have an older Diagnostics HTML report without embedded JSON. Can you inspect the session logs and summarize the likely crash cause without dumping all logs?
evals.expected_output: Falls back to legacy HTML parsing, identifies session metadata and error/crash-like log entries, and avoids restating the full report.

evals.prompt: This Diagnostics report has a JSON-backed Session Logs chapter and some custom legacyHTML chapters. Figure out whether the issue is more likely app configuration or a runtime error.
evals.expected_output: Reads structured JSON first, inspects logs before legacyHTML fallback chapters, compares evidence from metadata/custom chapters, and recommends next steps.
